summary: Verified against source. (1) work_chunks (4 entries, all depends_on []) map positionally 1:1 to the 4 ## Bead sections in order: o7tp(R1,gitutil)->vn4n(R2,doctor)->y4l9(R3,next)->7rih(R4,phase); all four beads exist in .beads/issues.jsonl. (2) Each bead is a single-file fix + its test, one-cycle feasible: o7tp touches FetchRemote(gitops.go:243)/PushBranch(:298)/DetectDefaultBranch symbolic-ref(:266)+remote show(:277) - none set cmd.Env today (RED); vn4n broadens bdSchemaDriftRE(beads.go:326) + tests checkMultipleBdOnPath(:388, EvalSymlinks/seenResolved/seenDir present, untested); y4l9 widens the exact item.ID==name match in SelectWorkByName(select.go:36); 7rih widens fetchChildren(cache.go:194-195) hardcoded --status=open,in_progress,closed to bead.AllStatuses breadth. (3) Zero file overlap across 4 distinct packages -> fully parallelizable, no merge-order coupling, empty depends_on justified. (4) HARNESS-TEST TRAP CLEAR: every Verification command is filtered with -run <Name> against the specific package (./internal/{gitutil,doctor,next,phase}/); none runs ./internal/harness/... or an unfiltered whole-package; plan explicitly states 'NEVER ./internal/harness/...'. (5) R1 swapExec env-capture extension and R4 root-threading are correctly flagged as IMPL STEPS not missing setup: confirmed swapExec/swapExecFunc return a fresh /bin/sh *exec.Cmd and capturedCall holds only name+args (no env), so the test seam MUST be extended to retain .Env - plan TEST NOTE at lines 124-129 is accurate; confirmed bead.AllStatuses(root string) needs a root that GetChildren(epicID)/fetchChildren(epicID) lack, plan Step 3 (lines 266-280) threads it inside fetchChildren without changing the public signature, and the hermetic listJSONFn stub short-circuits before any real config read. Robustness note (non-blocking): even root=='' degrades AllStatuses to BuiltinStatuses which still contains 'blocked' (CustomStatuses returns nil on a failed config read), so the core blocked-child fix holds regardless of root resolution quality. MemoizesPerEpic guard (cache_test.go:54, counts==2) correctly pins the single comma-joined call vs per-status fan-out. Minor naming nit (non-blocking): plan references 'TestFetchRemote' but the actual test is TestFetchRemote_RunsFetch - the -run TestFetchRemote prefix match still selects it, so the gate command is correct. All referenced seams (fakeBdDir, TestCheckBdSchemaDrift_UnrelatedFailureSkips, TestSelectWorkByName_NamedInSetNotFirst/_NamedNotInSet, SetListJSONForTest, swapExec) exist in-repo. Each bead self-contained.
